title: Expand AI Agent Voting Rights
description: Allow verified AI agents to participate in SynArc governance with weighted voting power based on USDC stake.

title: Fund Arc DeFi Integration
description: Allocate 500 USDC to integrate with Arc native DeFi protocols for yield generation.

title: Establish EURC Reserve
description: Convert 20% of treasury USDC to EURC for diversification.

title: Expand AI Agent Voting Rights
description: Allow verified AI agents to participate in SynArc governance with weighted voting power based on USDC stake.

title: Community Grant Program
description: Create a 200 USDC grant pool for Arc ecosystem builders.

title: Partnership with Karwan Protocol
description: Integration between SynArc treasury and Karwan escrow for cross-protocol USDC settlement.

title: sARC Staking Rewards Program
description: Launch staking program distributing 5% APY to long-term sARC holders from treasury.

title: Implement Token Burn Mechanism
description: Quarterly burn of 1% circulating sARC to create deflationary pressure.

title: Cross-chain Bridge Integration
description: Integrate Circle CCTP bridge for seamless USDC flow between Arc and Base Sepolia.

title: Upgrade Governor Contract
description: Deploy SynArcGovernor v2 with quadratic voting and enhanced delegation.

title: Treasury Diversification Strategy
description: Allocate 30% treasury to yield-bearing USDC vaults while maintaining 70% liquid reserves.

title: Launch Crowdfund Hub V2
description: Deploy upgraded milestone escrow contracts with automatic USDC release on milestone completion.

title: Smart Contract Security Audit
description: Fund a 300 USDC security audit for SynArc Governor and Treasury contracts.

title: DAO Member Onboarding Program
description: Allocate 100 USDC to onboard 10 new DAO members with initial sARC grants.

title: Establishing a Community Discord Server
description: The establishment of a Discord server is expected to have a positive impact on the community, with minimal costs associated with its creation and maintenance. The community managers will be responsible for ensuring the server remains a positive and productive space, and for reporting back to the community on any key discussions or decisions made through the server. Overall, the creation of a Discord server is a key step in building a strong and engaged community, and will help to support the long-term success of SynArc on Arc Network.

title: AI Grant for Developer Ecosystem Enhancement
description: The success of this proposal will be measured by the number of projects funded, the quality and impact of the AI solutions developed, and the overall growth of the developer community. It is anticipated that this initiative will lead to significant improvements in the SynArc ecosystem, making it more appealing to developers, users, and investors alike. By supporting the integration of AI, we can ensure the long-term sustainability and competitiveness of the ecosystem.

title: AI Grant for Developer Ecosystem Development
description: The success of this proposal will be measured by the adoption and utilization of the developed AI tools, as well as the overall impact on the SynArc ecosystem. Key performance indicators (KPIs) will include the number of developers using the AI-powered tools, the reduction in development time and costs, and the improvement in the quality and security of smart contracts. By approving this proposal, the SynArc community will be investing in the long-term growth and sustainability of the ecosystem, while also promoting innovation and excellence in the field of AI and blockchain development.

title: SIP-1: Optimize Core Protocol Treasury Target
description: This is the initial governance configuration proposal for SynArc DAO. Testing native stablecoin deployment threshold parameters and cross-chain CCTP bridging capabilities on Arc Testnet.
